text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Morning, Trainer. Thanks again for yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I got such a good rest, my body is feeling great.
So could you ramp up the menu for today's
training?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll do better than last time for sure!
